name: manhwa-chapter-check
description: Check if new English chapters of ANY manhwa series have been released recently. Give it any series name and it searches the web for latest chapter numbers — Extra's Academy Survival Guide, Tower of God, Solo Leveling, or whatever you're reading. Uses Exa web search + Parallel search + Reddit, routed MPP via the SELAT Router.

series.description: Name of the manhwa series to check for new chapters (e.g. 'Tower of God', 'Solo Leveling', 'Extra's Academy Survival Guide')

steps.label: Exa web search for series chapter info (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
Parallel search corroboration — additional sources (routed MPP via SELAT Router)

body.objective: Find the latest English chapter number for ${series} manhwa

steps.label: Reddit discussion — StableSocial subreddit search (routed MPP via SELAT Router)
